creator: albertgordojr@yahoo.com
text:
I just can't find ways to make my (gre0) tunnel permanently, I have already recompile my KERNEL and try to put some gre forwading at rc.conf but no luck. Here is my ifconfig:

tipinet# ifconfig
xl0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> mtu 1500
        options=9<RXCSUM,VLAN_MTU>
        inet6 fe80::210:4bff:fe1c:4e71%xl0 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x1
        inet 10.11.3.222 netmask 0xfffff800 broadcast 10.11.7.255
        ether 00:10:4b:1c:4e:71
        media: Ethernet 10baseT/UTP (autoselect)
        status: active
plip0: flags=108810<POINTOPOINT,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST,NEEDSGIANT> mtu 1500
lo0: flags=8049<UP,LOOPBACK,RUNNING,MULTICAST> mtu 16384
        inet6 ::1 prefixlen 128
        inet6 fe80::1%lo0 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x3
        inet 127.0.0.1 netmask 0xff000000
gre0: flags=9051<UP,POINTOPOINT,RUNNING,LINK0,MULTICAST> mtu 1476
        tunnel inet 10.11.3.222 --> 10.11.0.22
        inet6 fe80::210:4bff:fe1c:4e71%gre0 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x4
        inet 10.11.3.222 --> 10.11.0.22 netmask 0xfffff800
